content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 29, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 29, 2026, focused on expanding mobile capabilities, refining agent runtime operations, and improving architectural modularity. Key achievements include the successful implementation of a full local agent on Android, the introduction of a runtime operations manager, and significant cleanup of hard-coded dependencies to improve backend modularity.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Mobile & Local Agent Architecture**
    *   Implemented a full local agent architecture for Android, including a foreground service (`MiladyAgentService`) that executes a Bun runtime and agent bundle from APK assets ([#7172](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7172), [#7205](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7205), [#7176](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7176)).
*   **Runtime Operations & Workflow Management**
    *   Introduced `RuntimeOperationManager` to handle single-flight runtime operations and widget host refreshes ([#7166](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7166)).
    *   Enhanced n8n workflow generation by surfacing originating conversation context (Discord/Telegram) and injecting live connector facts into prompts ([#7164](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7164), [#7163](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7163)).
*   **System Refactoring & Dependency Management**
    *   Decoupled `@elizaos/agent` from hard-coded app-specific packages by migrating routes to a plugin-lifecycle registration system ([#7204](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7204)).
    *   Performed extensive dependency updates, including TypeScript 6.0.3, Node.js 24.15.0, and various CI/CD action upgrades ([#7151](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7151), [#7148](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7148)).
    *   Added a new `build-monetized-app` skill to the agent framework ([#7160](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7160)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Vault & Secrets Management:** [#7197](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7197), [#7194](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7194), and [#7187](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7187) introduce `@elizaos/vault` for cross-platform secrets management and Settings UI integration.
*   **Refactoring:** [#7195](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7195) focuses on simplifying runtime operations by deduplicating utilities.
*   **Registry Fixes:** [#7196](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7196) renames the Polymarket app ID to prevent collisions.

## CLOSED ISSUES

*   **Runtime & Configuration Errors:** Resolved issues regarding opaque error messages when no LLM provider is configured ([#7203](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7203)) and dangling imports following shim deletions ([#7202](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7202)).
*   **Architecture & Backend Decoupling:** Addressed the "standalone backend" contradiction by migrating hard-coded app routes into the plugin-lifecycle system ([#7204](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7204)).
*   **Telegram Integration:** Fixed issues with Telegram read receipts by implementing ID-based fetching and removing inefficient nested lookups ([#7009](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7009)).

## NEW ISSUES

*   **Build Configuration:** [#7210](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7210) reports a missing `claude-code-stealth.mjs` preload file referenced in `dev-ui.mjs` for fresh clones.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*(No active issues with more than 3 comments were identified for this reporting period.)*
